argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const text = '{{ text }}'; const submit = {{ submit }}; try { const visible = (el) => !!el && (el.offsetParent !== null || el.getClientRects().length > 0); const boxes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="tweetTextarea_0"]')); const box = boxes.find(visible) || boxes[0]; if (!box) return { ok: false, message: 'Could not find the reply text area. Are you logged in?' }; box.focus(); if (!document.execCommand('insertText', false, text)) { const dataTransfer = new DataTransfer(); dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', text); box.dispatchEvent(new ClipboardEvent('paste', { clipboardData: dataTransfer, bubbles: true, cancelable: true })); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); if (!submit) { return { ok: true, message: 'Reply text entered (not submitted).', text: text, submitted: false }; } const buttons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="tweetButton"], [data-testid="tweetButtonInline"]')); const btn = buttons.find((el) => visible(el) && !el.disabled); if (!btn) return { ok: false, message: 'Reply button is disabled or not found.', text: text, submitted: false }; btn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); return { ok: true, message: 'Reply posted successfully.', text: text, submitted: true }; } catch (e) { return { ok: false, message: String(e) }; } }

variables.name: text
variables.help: The text content of your reply

variables.name: submit
variables.help: Whether to submit the reply (false = only enter text)
